title: Embered Tent — Ochre
summary: Embered tent in ochre; built in United States for daily use.

content.text:
# Embered Tent — Ochre

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Embered Tent — Ochre is designed for the long haul, with outdoor-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in United States.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.

{"weight_g":486,"materials":{"upper":"full-grain leather","sole":"oak-tanned leather","lining":"vegetable-tanned calfskin"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"United States","capacity":"3-person"}
